# CWE-89 negative: taint-tracked SQL injection with hardcoded query
lang: go
file: CWE-89-taint-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func LookupUser(db *sql.DB, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	_ = db.Query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'")
}
